productDisplayName: Nike Women's EM Tempo 3.5" Pink Short
description: CompositionPink shorts made of 100% polyester, with a 100% polyester lining, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has an in-built underwear, elasticated waist with a drawstring, side meshed panels in white with a black piping and embroidered nike swoosh on the left legFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron or dry clean Stylish to the T, these polyester shorts from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, while you can further customise the fit with the drawstring. The in-built underwear offers greater comfort. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
